title: blepharis fenestralis
intro: Blepharis fenestralis, also known as the window-watching hairworts or fenestrated blepharis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. Traditionally, Blepharis fenestralis has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Blepharis fenestralis include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory issues. In terms of herbal preparations, Blepharis fenestralis is often used in the form of tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used as a poultice or topical application to treat skin conditions.
